title: Safe fused PPO vanilla-path integration
summary: Extend the existing fused PPO helper so it can replace the vanilla policy-loss hot path without losing pg_clipfrac_lower, aggregation semantics, or scalar metrics.
success_gate: Only integrate if the fused helper preserves vanilla PPO semantics, supports the required aggregation mode, and wins on the representative end-to-end path.

results.integration: compute_fused_ppo_loss integrated into compute_policy_loss_vanilla for loss_agg_mode == token-mean
results.kernel_extension: pg_clipfrac_lower added as 5th return value to compute_fused_ppo_loss
